We offer optional add-ons like Cohost AI and Magic Mastering. Pricing depends on your plan, and you can add or remove them at any time.

Existing customers may keep their Legacy plans and pricing. If you downgrade, cancel, or move your podcast, you will not be eligible for Legacy pricing.

If you’re considering a change, you can review your options in your account or reach out to our success team.

We collect sales tax where required based on your billing location. If it applies, you’ll see it clearly on your invoice.

## The tools you need to host, grow and monetize your podcast

Barrier-Free Monetization

## Diversified podcast monetization for your most ambitious goals.

Every voice has value. Each Libsyn plan provides top-tier tools for monetizing, whether you’re starting, ready to launch, or already legendary. Everyone can monetize at Libsyn.

### Podroll With Libsyn

Put your second-most-recent episode to work. Promote other podcasts, uplift fellow creators, and earn revenue—all without interrupting your content with ads.

### Automatic Podcast Ads

Monetize with confidence. Pick your ad categories and choose your placements. We never drop ads into the middle of your content unless you say so.

### Full-Service Ad Sales Team

Skip the sponsor wrangling. Our team connects you with high-quality brand partners that fit your audience and helps you build long-term brand and creator relationships.

## Podcast analytics ...[truncated 2246 chars]...prise plans include built-in monetization tools like PodRoll with Libsyn, Automatic Podcast Ads, and Apple Podcasts Subscriptions integration.

We provide lAB-certified analytics tracking listener demographics, download metrics, and engagement rates across all your episodes.

Our support team offers email, chat, and phone support depending on your plan. Enterprise customers receive dedicated account management.

Do I always maintain ownership of my podcast and content?

Yes, you always own your content and your podcast. We never stick advertising in your content without your permission, edit your content, or claim ownership.

Yes, you can always go into your account settings and cancel your Libsyn account at any time.

Our hosting plans are not based on how many downloads your show gets in a month, but on how much new content is loaded to your account every month. You don’t have to worry about surprise charges or rate increases if your episode downloads and audience grows."

## Everything you need to take your podcast to new heights

Grow faster + earn more money with RedCircle.

#### RedCircle Ad Platform

RAP is the only automated platform combining host-read and programmatic ads. While you’re busy creating amazing content, we’ll be working behind the scenes to bring you more advertising opportunities. Utilize our hosting platform’s dynamic insertion technology to swap ads in and out of your episodes, or keep your existing hosting and connect your content to OpenRAP via VAST.

#### Hosting and Distribution

Host with unlimited episodes, storage, and downloads. Publish to all major platforms including Spotify, Apple Podcasts, Amazon Music, YouTube, and more. Generate videos and transcripts for your episodes with one click.

#### Powerful Analytics

Understand your audience and get smarter as you go with powerful built-in analytics. Add URL prefixes and pixel tracking for integrati...[truncated 501 chars]...mless experience for your listeners. Never miss an opportunity to grow your audience or build more revenue.

#### Network Capabilities

Host unlimited shows and provide unique permissions to multiple team members. With a dedicated support team, we can help you monetize across your entire network, all in one place. Integrate your own advertising partnerships and grow on your own terms.

#### Subscriptions & Donations

Make money using flexible options that align with your content and business goals. Accept donations or place exclusive content behind a paywall for more recurring revenue. Payments are fast and easy with Apple Pay and Google Pay, or directly through Stripe.

#### Fast Support

Get help when you need it. You can count on our top-notch reliability and support. We respond within hours, not days. We’re here to make sure you get the most out of RedCircle.

#### Stir sh\*t up

Switch your podcast to RedCircle in just a few clicks. Bring your downloads with you."

Make your show the next big thingPowerful tools from Spotify to manage and grow your audio or video podcast.

## All the tools to grow your show

Build a dedicated followingTap into millions of fans on Spotify who can discover and interact directly with your episodes. Upload clips, manage comments, and keep tabs on your analytics to grow your fanbase and keep them coming back for more.

Earn on your showChoose from a range of monetization tools designed to help you earn effortlessly. See how our new Spotify Partner Program unlocks additional income streams across both audio and video.

Stand out on SpotifyTake control over how your show appears on Spotify, with customization tools for your show page, video thumbnails, and more.

Interested in audio podcasts?Discover all the ways Spotify for Creators helps you distribute your show, engage your listeners, track your growth, and more — no matter where you’re hosted.

Looking to add video?Find out how Spotify is bringing video to the forefront, and explore all the tools you need to upload your videos, get discovered, build a loyal following, and grow your show."

## 01

## The power of video on Spotify

Ove **r** **430,000 shows** upload video on Spotify. These shows are leading the future of podcasts — standing out with visual storytelling and deeper fan engagement.  
  
Video isn't just popular, it's what fans want: in a recent study, 72% of podcast listeners said they prefer shows with video1. With more people than ever watching podcasts on Spotify, publishing video is one of the fastest ways to grow your audience.

## Check out what creators have to say

<iframe src="https://player.vimeo.com/video/1156663574?api=1&controls=0" frameborder="0" allow="aut...[truncated 15295 chars]...iums with Spotify’s rapidly growing video audience.  
These estimates are not a guarantee of performance or revenue and are only intended to be used as directional guidance. Estimates are generated from US-based publishers using USD.

The Spotify Partner Program can offer diversified revenue for shows monetizing with ads from the Spotify Audience Network. Indie creators often find that Premium video revenue is the simplest way to grow both audiences and earnings.  
These estimates are not a guarantee of performance or revenue and are only intended to be used as directional guidance. Estimates are generated from US-based publishers using USD.

Switching is simple

Completely free podcast hosting in three easy steps

Find your showJust search for your show name or paste in your RSS feed, and we can automatically import all of your episodes and metadata.

Redirect your feedWe’ll give you a link so your old host knows where to send your content, and you’ll keep all of your followers on every platform.

Keep creatingUpload new audio or video episodes here. Spotify for Creators is the only hosting platform that supports both formats.

Switch to the platform that has it allUnlock full access to video on Spotify, RSS distribution, 24/7 creator support, and monetization in select markets. Plus, get proprietary tools to connect with fans, track your performance, and stand out on Spotify — all in one place, all for free.

## Come for the free hosting, stay for all the perks

Get paid for your passion Explore ads, fan support options, and more ways to monetize your show, no matter what size your audience is. Plus, get free episode uploads and storage.

Full access to video on SpotifyGet the power to schedule and monetize your videos on Spotify, and publish audio versions everywhere you have RSS distribution. See how video can boost your engagement and audience retention on Spotify.

Better insights, better engagementGet detailed stats on episode retention and demographics. Find out where on Spotify you’re being discovered with impression analytics. And manage it all from one comprehensive dashboard."

If you host your podcast with Buzzsprout, Voxnest, Podbean, or any host except Spotify, you can claim your show on Spotify for Creators.

A show can only be claimed once on Spotify for Creators. If a podcast you’re trying to claim has already been claimed, you’ll need to reach out to the existing admin or owner of the show in order for them to [follow these steps](/us/creators/article/inviting-your-team/).

## New to Spotify for Creators?

1. Go to [creators.spotify.com](https://creators.spotify.com/pod/login) and log in to any Spotify account.  
	**Note:** If you don't have a Spotify account, you can [create one for free](https://www.spotify.com/signup).
2. Select **Find an existing show** then **Somewhere else**.
3. Enter your podcast’s RSS feed or Spotify show URL.

With Spotify for Creators, you can create and host audio and video podcasts, as well as manage podcasts you host elsewhere.

1. Log in to [creators.spotify.com](https://creators.spotify.com/pod/login) using your Spotify account.
2. Select your avatar then choose **Add a new show** (on a mobile device, tap first).

Not sure which option to pick? Use the guides below to find the right path.

### Create a new show

Choose this option if:

- You’re launching a brand new podcast or show.
- You want to bring existing videos from other platforms to Spotify.

You can upload audio, video, or a mix of both. To record and edit audio or video, [check out our integration with Riverside](/us/creators/article/creating-with-riverside-fm/).

Your episodes are automatically published to Spotify. After your first episode is live, you can distribute your show to other platforms too.

## Upload once, distribute everywhere

Add your video episode, and we’ll automatically publish it to YouTube, Apple Podcasts, Spotify, RSS, and more.

### Upload your video episode

Add your video podcast episode using our easy-to-use dashboard

### Distribute your show everywhere

All of your shows will be distributed to Apple Podcasts, Spotify, etc.

### HLS Streaming

We’ll also host an HLS streaming version for Apple Podcasts and other podcast apps.

Coming soon

## Unified analytics

View analytics for every platform (video and audio episodes) in one place.

## From the channel

Here's an overview of Transistor's new Video Podcast Hosting features

★★★★★

“I’ve hosted multiple shows with Transistor for years and it’s far and away my favorite podcasting platform. They continually add useful features, and now with HLS video I can distribute my shows in all the formats my audience desires from o...[truncated 3984 chars]...nly, they get the same content. This is the same approach used by Spotify and YouTube Music for video podcasts. One upload, one feed, one audience.

You don't have to. Audio-only podcasting isn't going anywhere. There are still plenty of folks who prefer the audio experience!

## More Features

[View all Features](/features/)

#### Integrations

### Integrations for your podcast workflow

Transistor integrates with MailChimp, Drip, HubSpot, ConvertKit, MailerLite, ActiveCampaign, and Klaviyo for email subscriptions. We also integrate with Bluesky and YouTube for auto-posting. For autom

#### Dynamic Ads

### Dynamic Ad podcast hosting platform

Transistor offers dynamic ad insertion for podcasts. Our DAI tool allows podcasters to automatically insert audio or announcements at the beginning, middle, or end of their episodes.

#### Embeddable Player

### Custom embeddable podcast player

Customize the look and settings of your podcast player and embed it anywhere"

![](https://pbcdn1.podbean.com/fs1/site/www-v2/images/start/youtube-podcast-bg-banner@2x_resize_1x.webp)

Expand Your Audience Reach

## Easily Turn Your YouTube Playlist into a Podcast

Transforming your YouTube playlist into a podcast opens up endless possibilities for reaching and connecting with listeners across diverse platforms.

![](https://pbcdn1.podbean.com/fs1/site/www-v2/images/start/youtube-podcast-banner@2x_resize_1x.webp)

## Why Turn Your YouTube Playlist into a Podcast

Convert your YouTube playlist into a podcast to expand your audience and explore diverse podcast monetization opportunities.

![](https://pbcdn1.podbean.com/fs1/site/www-v2/images/start/youtube-podcast-one@2x_resize_1x.webp) ![](https://pbcdn1.podbean.com/fs1/site/www-v2/images/start/youtube-podcast-one-people@2x_resize_1x.webp) ![](https://pbcdn1.podbean.com/fs1/site/www-v2/images/start/youtube-podcast-one-logo@2x_resize_1x.webp...[truncated 4307 chars]...lled $144 annually.

## Frequently Asked Questions

Importing your YouTube playlist to a podcast is easy with Podbean. Simply follow the simple steps outlined in our [FAQ](https://help.podbean.com/support/solutions/articles/25000032243-turn-youtube-videos-to-podcast) .

Yes, you can customize the title, description, podcast logo, and other details of your podcast with ease. [Learn more](https://help.podbean.com/support/solutions/articles/25000005101-podcast-basic-settings) .

If you've opted for automatic import and publishing, our platform will detect any new videos added to your connected playlists and seamlessly convert them into podcast episodes, ensuring uninterrupted continuity for your podcast.

The duration of importing depends on the length and number of videos in your playlist. Podbean strives to ensure efficient and timely importing of your content.

You have the flexibility to choose. You can convert them into an audio podcast or opt for a video podcast format."

Articles on: [Setting up your podcast](/en/category/setting-up-your-podcast-x0v7rl/)

Are you currently hosting on Buzzsprout, Libsyn, Podbean, or Anchor?

****You can easily import your podcast into Transistor!****

Once the import is complete, and you've updated Apple Podcasts, you can delete your old hosting account.

![](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xCWclJhVwSc)

## Step 1: log into Transistor and click "Add show"

In the "My Shows" menu, click "Add show." You'll see a screen that looks like this:

You're going to be using the "Import an Existing Show" section.

## Step 2: find your main RSS feed for your show

Now, find your podcast's main feed URL.

For example, in Simplecast, go to "Sharing" in the menu, and copy the URL under "RSS Feed."

In Libsyn, go to your Dashboard, and click on "Designations." Click “Edit” for the “Libsyn Classic Feed.”

## Step 3: wait while we import y...[truncated 1764 chars]...even after you cancel your Libsyn account.

### Forward your old PodBean feed

Log into your account and visit this URL:

[http://www.podbean.com/feed-redirect-301](http://www.podbean.com/feed-redirect-301)

## Step 7: Start to close down your previous hosting account

It's best to wait two weeks before you delete your old hosting account.

We recommend you take an export of your historical analytics from your old hosting provider for your own records. Analytics do not migrate between hosts so your Transistor analytics will start fresh.

Ensure your redirect is in place. Check any new episodes you publish on Transistor are being picked up on podcast directories like Spotify and Apple Podcasts etc.

Once you have checked your redirect is working and you have saved a copy of your historical analytics, you can delete your old hosting account.

## You're all done!

Your podcast is now hosted on Transistor and new episodes should be added here.

Updated on: 05/03/2025"

"Done. I used official public pages only and left open the key tabs for Spotify plus the strongest alternatives: Spotify, Podbean, Buzzsprout, and RSS.com.

## Spotify onboarding path confirmed

Spotify’s current public entry point is **Get started** / **Set up a new show**. Clicking **Set up a new show** opens Spotify account login before show setup. Spotify’s public help says that after login you use **Add a new show**, then choose either **Create a new show** or **Find an existing show**. For an existing show, choose **Somewhere else** and enter the RSS feed or Spotify show URL. <citation refs="14rxwu3xKm4gtiJK-PHnr">Spotify says: “Select your avatar then choose Add a new show,” then choose “Create a new show” or “Find an existing show.”</citation> <citation refs="lhDQjZhXnv4wSi5cshbIX">For existing shows, Spotify says to select “Find an existing show,” then “Somewhere else,” then enter the podcast RSS feed or Spotify show URL.</citation>

## 8-option comparison

| Option | New show / import | Distribution | Video support | Public free or lowest price | Analytics / monetization shown | YouTube repurposing limitation |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Spotify for Creators** | Create new, claim existing, or switch by RSS. <citation refs="RTUUR8GWaSrwXVhUfQN_6">Spotify says you can paste in your RSS feed and it can import episodes and metadata.</citation> | Spotify plus major podcast apps via RSS. <citation refs="N6VisXFGWLkL8XR1LD7BM">Spotify says it helps distribute across all major podcast apps.</citation> | Yes. Spotify-native video, audio via RSS elsewhere. <citation refs="xVyDsEFjLpUrqINq_7ySs">Spotify says video uploads are delivered on Spotify, while other listening platforms get audio via RSS.</citation> | Free | Analytics, comments, Spotify Partner Program, ads, premium video revenue. | No automatic YouTube import shown on public pages. Manual upload likely needed unless using another workflow. |
| **Podbean** | New show, free import ...[truncated 5690 chars]..."
